name: Dixie Peanut Brittle (Microwave Method)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, stir together the peanuts, sugar, corn syrup, and salt.
2. Cook for 8 minutes on high in the microwave, stirring well after 4 minutes.
3. Stir in butter and vanilla. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes on high.
4. Add baking soda and quickly stir until light and foamy.
5. Immediately pour the mixture onto a lightly greased baking sheet and spread it out very thin.
6. Allow to cool, then break into small pieces.
7. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 1 pound.
